response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer with strong architectural skills and a commendable dedication to engineering best practices (TDD, CI/CD), he fundamentally lacks the core technical requirements for this role. Specifically, the position requires 8 years of C++ experience and deep expertise in building cloud compute platforms or low-level infrastructure, whereas Bogdan's background is predominantly in full-stack web development (Node.js, TypeScript) and DLang.
strengths: Extensive experience in software design, architecture, and establishing engineering best practices like TDD and CI/CD.
Proven track record of technical mentorship through organized workshops, coding dojos, and community courses.
Demonstrated ability to build and scale distributed systems, such as handling high-throughput microservices at Dunnhumby.
concerns: Fails to meet the strict minimum requirement of 8 years of C++ programming experience, with only a few months of professional C++ work listed.
Lacks deep, specialized experience in building internal cloud compute platforms, storage, or hardware architecture.
Recent experience is heavily skewed towards full-stack web development (TypeScript, Node.js) and AI tooling rather than core infrastructure.
